category_sources: source_facts.description says it manages git repositories in one place; official README describes managing multiple git repositories.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and the official GitHub repository heading identify the project as gitbatch.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the main documentation surface and links to the official wiki pages for more information.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe batch management of multiple Git repositories from the command line.
